assertions.title: All interactive elements are keyboard accessible

steps.observed: Login form displayed with Username, Password, Sign In button, Create an account link

steps.action: Press Tab to navigate through elements
steps.expected: Focus moves to each interactive element
steps.observed: Tab moved focus from Username -> Password -> Sign In button -> Create an account link
Register form displayed with Username, Password, Create Account button, Sign in link

steps.action: Verify all form elements have labels
steps.observed: Username and Password inputs have labels via label[for] attributes

evidence.keyboardNavigation: Tab key successfully moves focus through all interactive elements in logical order

steps.observed: Same box-shadow focus indicator as Username field
borderColor changes to golden rgb(201, 162, 39) on focus, boxShadow shows 3px golden glow
Username input: hasLabel=true, labelText='Username'; Password input: hasLabel=true, labelText='Password'
Username input: hasLabel=true, labelText='Username'; Password input: hasLabel=true, labelText='Password'

steps.expected: Labels properly associated via for attribute
steps.observed: Labels use for attribute matching input id (login-username, login-password, register-username, register-password)

assertions.title: Color contrast meets WCAG AA

steps.observed: Heading 'Welcome Back': textColor rgb(45,42,38), bgColor rgb(245,240,232), ratio 12.59:1 - PASSES
Label text: textColor rgb(74,69,61), bgColor rgb(245,240,232), ratio 8.38:1 - PASSES

steps.expected: Minimum 4.5:1 for normal text (or 3:1 for large text)
steps.observed: Button text: textColor rgb(245,240,232), bgColor rgb(201,162,39), ratio 2.13:1 - FAILS
Button font-size is 16px, not 'large text', so requires 4.5:1 contrast

assertions.issues: Button text contrast (2.13:1) does not meet WCAG AA requirements. Cream colored text on golden background fails both the 4.5:1 standard text requirement and the 3:1 large text requirement (since button text is only 16px).

frictions.description: Disk space was nearly full (only 116MB available) during testing, causing some screenshot operations to fail with ENOSPC error
frictions.resolution: Removed temporary PNG files from project root to free up space

summary: Tested 4 accessibility assertions: 3 passed (VAL-A11Y-001, VAL-A11Y-002, VAL-A11Y-003), 1 failed (VAL-A11Y-004). The button text contrast on the login form fails WCAG AA requirements with only 2.13:1 ratio instead of required 4.5:1. Form labels and keyboard accessibility all work correctly.
